nova-3.pricingNotes: Nova-3 Monolingual pre-recorded pricing is $0.0077/min and Speaker Diarization is $0.0020/min. AutoShow always sends diarize=true, so estimates use $0.0097/min ($0.582/hr). Free credits, Growth discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Deepgram's current docs publish a 2 GB file cap and separately state no limits to audio length for batch transcription, with a 10-minute processing-time cap for Nova/Base/Enhanced requests.
